metadata.description: Claude Code plugins for product design and project planning workflows

plugins.name: requirements-gatherer
plugins.description: Requirements gathering interview and issue creation workflow. A senior product consultant interviews users to produce structured requirements, then an organizer converts reviewed requirements into GitHub milestones/issues or Jira epics/stories.

plugins.name: visual-design
plugins.description: Visual design system toolkit. Consultant skill for establishing design systems via interview or site extraction with page discovery, parallel fingerprinting, fluid responsive detection, and custom component motion discovery. Component-context skill with fuzzy matching for on-demand spec delivery. Design-reviewer skill for live visual quality gate testing via Chrome browser inspection. Functional-tester skill for Playwright page-level functional tests.
